title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
